top_signals.title: Trend Micro warns of Apex One zero-day exploited in the wild
top_signals.summary: Japanese cybersecurity software company Trend Micro has addressed an Apex One zero-day vulnerability exploited in attacks targeting Windows systems. [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: South Africa’s Pick n Pay Slumps After New Target Delayed
top_signals.summary: South Africa’s Pick n Pay Stores Ltd. fell after it delayed a key turnaround target by a year, tempering optimism that had driven the grocer’s stock higher ahead of the results.
